input_dict.question: Who was a Greek film director Andrew Lau or Yannis Smaragdis?
input_dict.source_summary: Yannis Smaragdis is a Greek film director. Andrew Lau is a Hong Kong film director, producer, and cinematographer (born 4 April 1960). Yannis Smaragdis directed El Greco (2007) and the 1983 Greek drama Homecoming Song.
input_dict.target_summary: Yannis Smaragdis — Iannis Smaragdis (Greek: Γιάννης Σμαραγδής) is a Greek film director. He is credited as director of El Greco (2007) and the 1983 Greek drama Homecoming Song. Andrew Lau — Andrew Lau Wai-Keung (born 4 April 1960) is a Hong Kong film director, producer, and cinematographer.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Yannis Smaragdis — Iannis Smaragdis (Greek: Γιάννης Σμαραγδής) is a Greek film director. He is credited as director of El Greco (2007) and the 1983 Greek drama Homecoming Song. Andrew Lau — Andrew Lau Wai-Keung (born 4 April 1960) is a Hong Kong film director, producer, and cinematographer.
